summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected because this shard is not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned; the job disables low-signal closeout, instant close, merge, and fix PRs. Security-sensitive linked refs are routed item-by-item only.
